rng_recipe: rng=np.random.default_rng(seed); pool_ids=rng.permutation(len(Xtr))[:POOL_N]; ti=rng.permutation(len(Xte)); val_ids=ti[:VAL_N]; test_ids=ti[VAL_N:VAL_N+TEST_N]; calibration_ids=ti[VAL_N+TEST_N:]; POOL_N=4000, VAL_N=2000, TEST_N=3000, N_FAULTS=21; ids index the stacked TEP arrays: train = d00.dat + d01..dNN.dat in fault order, test = d00_te.dat + d01_te..dNN_te.dat with fault files truncated to rows [160:]
